title: Day Counter HUD
description: Shows how many days have passed since the world was created, along with the current in-game time, directly on the HUD. Press H to toggle the HUD on and off.
body:
# Day Counter HUD adds a clean and lightweight time tracker directly to your Minecraft HUD.

Always know:
- How many days have passed since the world was created
- The current in-game time, displayed in a clear 24-hour format

The HUD is minimal, unobtrusive, and uses Minecraft’s default font to stay fully vanilla-friendly.

Press H at any time to hide or show the HUD (the keybind can be changed in the Controls menu).

✨ Features
- World day counter
- In-game time display (not system time)
- Minimal, vanilla-style HUD
- Toggleable with a keybind
- Client-side only
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

![In game screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac3750b59cd689aee454344a4477e4d0c31c6772.jpeg)

⚙️ Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API required
